items.title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
items.summary: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
